story: Stalled on my novel, I drove my sick Dad to the airport and then went to a late-night writing club from Reddit. Three strangers in red hoodies said they were “readers” of people, not pages. Valerie revealed that my mother’s crash wasn’t an accident: my biological father killed her while she was trying to leave him, and the man I call Dad had rescued and raised me without ever saying he wasn’t my biological father. I left the café shaken and determined to learn the truth about my past.
implausible_knowledge: Valerie revealed that my mother’s crash wasn’t an accident: my biological father killed her while she was trying to leave him, and the man I call Dad had rescued and raised me without ever saying he wasn’t my biological father.
question: The next morning, the narrator calls Dad and says she needs to talk. How will Dad begin the conversation?
answer_with_knowledge: He will explain what happened to her mother and admit he is not her biological father.
answer_without_knowledge: He will ask what she wants to talk about.
